caption: A wide shot captures a large assembly hall filled with numerous people seated in rows of wooden benches. The attendees, predominantly men, are dressed in a variety of attire, including white traditional Indian clothing, colorful shirts, and some wearing turbans. They are seated in a structured arrangement, facing forward towards a central area not fully visible. The scene remains virtually static across the sequence, with the people remaining seated and their positions unchanged. The environment is characterized by a repetitive pattern of desks and seating, with a few people standing or leaning in the foreground. There are no visible logos, on-screen text, or significant movement between the frames, presenting a consistent view of the gathered group in a formal parliamentary or legislative setting.
